title: schefflera cephalantha
intro: Schefflera cephalantha, also known as the umbrella plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae, native to the tropical forests of the Pacific Islands. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits associated with Schefflera cephalantha include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and extracts, as well as being applied topically to wounds and skin irritations.
